## 2026-06-02 multi-port server isolation — fix-shipped

### Final state
- version 0.90.2704 installed globally.
- jest 7/7 suites, 45/45 tests pass.
- live: 5520/10000/5555 all return real JSON; 10000 admin/ports 404 JSON; traffic state files `server:<sid>::<runtimeKey>` per-port.

### Key files
- src/server/runtime/http-server/port-registry.ts
- src/server/runtime/http-server/routes.ts (wrap helper)
- src/server/runtime/http-server/daemon-admin-routes.ts (admin guard)
- src/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.ts (scopeKey wiring)
- src/server/runtime/http-server/provider-traffic-governor.ts (scopeKey → stateKey)
- src/server/runtime/http-server/stats-manager*.ts (entryPort bucket)
- src/providers/core/utils/snapshot-writer.ts (ports/<port> path)
- src/utils/errorsamples.ts (scope/port dirs)
- tests/red-tests/multi_port_server_isolation.test.ts (7 red tests)
- docs/goals/multi-port-server-isolation-plan.md

### Anti-pattern lesson
- 5520/10000/5555 share one process. Without scopeKey, all three throttle the same provider traffic buckets → 10000's 429/timeout saturated by 5520 traffic. State files like `state/server%3A<sid>%3A%3A<runtimeKey>.json` are the truth.

## 2026-06-03 stop_followup tool_choice 400
- 线上样本 `openai-responses-minimax.key1-MiniMax-M3-20260603T080503707-252032-5543:stop_followup` provider wire 含 `tools:12` 但 `tool_choice:null`；普通 MiniMax 请求同工具集为 `tool_choice:{"type":"auto"}`。
- 根因：`src/server/runtime/http-server/executor/servertool-followup-dispatch.ts` 的 followup 清洗把 `tool_choice` 从 root body 和 requestSemantics 删除；followup 是正常请求，不应清洗工具选择语义。
- 红绿：新增 `stop_followup preserves client tool_choice as normal request semantics`；先红为 `Received undefined`，移除三处 `tool_choice` 删除后 `servertool-followup-dispatch.spec.ts` 29/29 绿。

## 2026-06-03 stop_followup tool_choice 第二根因
- 0.90.2706 修掉 TS followup 清洗后，live `openai-responses-minimax.key1-MiniMax-M3-20260603T081334031-252070-5581:stop_followup` 仍是 `tool_choice:null`。
- 新根因：Rust `build_captured_chat_request_snapshot` 和 `build_governed_filter_payload` 在缺失 `tool_choice` 时实体化 `null`；followup 正常请求带 tools 时必须保留/生成有效工具选择语义。
- 修复：snapshot 缺失不写 `tool_choice`；req_process stage1 governed filter 在 tools 非空且 tool_choice 缺失/null 时写 `"auto"`，无 tools 时不写。
- 红绿：`governed_filter_payload_defaults_tool_choice_auto_when_tools_exist`、`governed_filter_payload_drops_null_tool_choice_without_tools`、`test_build_captured_chat_request_snapshot_does_not_materialize_missing_tool_choice` 通过。

## 2026-06-03 MiniMax provider sentinel residue in request history
- Evidence: `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-responses/port-5555/req_1780445557524_7440af91/provider-request.json` already contained `]<]minimax[>[` and empty `minimax:tool_call` markers in `body.messages` and `meta.requestMetadata.__raw_request_body.input`, so the visible leak was request-history contamination, not a fresh provider response parse error.
- Fix truth: Rust request inbound context capture now strips provider tool sentinel residue from Responses history before it becomes provider wire; shared tool text normalization strips the same residue from tool output text.
- Red lock: `shared_tooling_strips_provider_tool_sentinel_residue_from_tool_text` and `normalize_responses_input_items_strips_provider_tool_sentinel_residue_from_history` cover bracket sentinels, empty namespace tool-call lines, function-call arguments, and tool outputs.

## 2026-06-03 followup tool_choice / synthetic control-text boundary
- Root cause: servertool followup Responses shape normalization preserved `tool_choice` only inside semantics, while nested live body lost root `tool_choice`; MiniMax followup can reject requests without tool choice. Rust SSOT now projects current-turn `semantics.responses.requestParameters.tool_choice` back to followup root without rewriting history.
- Boundary fix: native synthetic RouteCodex control-text scan now checks visible text fields only (`content/text/input_text/output_text/output`) and no longer recursively scans metadata/id/debug fields; prevents stop followup from being skipped by non-visible carriers.
- Test evidence: Rust `normalizes_responses_followup` and `synthetic_routecodex_control_text`; Jest servertool stop/dispatch targeted; residue audit targeted; `npm run build:min` passed and bumped build to 0.90.2718.

## 2026-06-03 servertool adapter context tool backfill rustification
- Violation found: `src/server/runtime/http-server/executor/servertool-adapter-context.ts` read tool names and replaced `capturedChatRequest.tools` in TS. This is servertool tool semantics and violates Rust-only Hub/servertool boundary.
- Fix: moved captured tool backfill decision to Rust NAPI `backfillServertoolAdapterContextToolsJson`; TS now calls `backfillServertoolAdapterContextToolsNative` and only applies native `changed/context` result.
- Red/green evidence: residue audit `servertool adapter context must not backfill captured tools with TS semantics` red before fix, green after; adapter-context targeted Jest green; Rust `backfill_servertool_adapter_context_tools` green; `npm run build:min` green after rootDir import fix.

## 2026-06-03 provider response requestSemantics tool merge rustification
- Violation found: `src/server/runtime/http-server/executor/provider-response-utils.ts` merged/deduped `clientToolsRaw` by tool name in TS while resolving request semantics for response handling. This is tool semantics and belongs in Rust.
- Fix: added Rust NAPI `resolveProviderResponseRequestSemanticsJson`; TS now delegates via `resolveProviderResponseRequestSemanticsNative()` and no longer contains tool-name merge/dedupe logic.
- Red/green evidence: residue audit `provider response utils must not merge request tools with TS semantics` red before fix and green after; existing `provider-response-utils.request-semantics.spec.ts` green; Rust `provider_response_request_semantics` green; `npm run build:min` green.

## 2026-06-03 codex samples + git audit: MiniMax 400 / sentinel leak

- Evidence sample: `/Volumes/extension/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-responses/ports/5555/minimax.key1.MiniMax-M3/req_1780453937865_2a3befcc/provider-request.json` is live provider body, not only meta snapshot: `meta.stage=provider-request`, `entryPort=5555`, `url=https://api.minimaxi.com/anthropic/v1/messages`, build `0.90.2712`.
- Live `body.messages` still contains provider sentinel residue such as `]<]minimax[>[` in assistant text; Python scan found `bodyHits=37`, so the earlier history scrub is not fully effective in the actual outbound path.
- The same provider request contains Anthropic-shaped `messages` with `tools=12` and `tool_choice={"type":"auto"}`. Tool-use/tool-result pairing scan on this sample found no immediate orphan in Anthropic messages (`tool_use ids=236`, `orphans=0`), so latest visible issue is historical text sentinel leak, while 2013 needs separate exact failing response/error sample pairing.
- Git timeline: recent commits touching this area include `fbaa20ff7 fix: scrub provider tool sentinels from history`, `b185ad458 fix: strip provider sentinels in response harvest`, `f636651de`, `a5fd64915`.
- Current uncommitted suspect: `chat_process_media_semantics.rs` adds `materialize_image_omitted_user_turns_as_tool_results()` and `req_outbound_stage3_compat/request_stage.rs` calls it. This creates `tool_result` from an `[Image omitted]` user turn and is a protocol-reconstruction behavior; per current rule, historical media strip must only replace media with placeholder, not synthesize tool results or rebuild tool context.
- Current uncommitted test adjustment pending: `resp_process_stage1_tool_governance_tests.rs` still has one assertion expecting `message["content"] == ""` around line 4088; previous patch did not land there.

## 2026-06-03 media/tool boundary correction

- User correction: `bd` is an executable command and must not be treated as a Codex tool name. Verified `codex-samples` has no real `"name":"bd"` / `多轨实现` / `multi-track` hits; previous `bd` tool-name case was an artificial unit-test shape.
- Removed the uncommitted protocol-reconstruction path `materialize_image_omitted_user_turns_as_tool_results`; media stripping now only replaces visual payloads with placeholders and may remove dangling visual `tool_use`, but must not synthesize `tool_result`.
- Response RCC harvest now checks RCC wrapper content before generic malformed `tool_calls` scanning, so wrapper tail stripping stays bounded to the wrapper instead of being stolen by generic JSON/exec heuristics.
- Missing-name RCC wrappers are preserved as text with no tool calls; requestedToolNames must not be used to synthesize a missing tool name.
- Validation: `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi resp_process_stage1_tool_governance --lib` => 188 passed, 0 failed, 1 ignored. `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi chat_process_media_semantics --lib` => 7 passed.

[2026-06-03] provider sentinel reasoning / stopless followup history fix
- User correction: `bd` is an executable shell command, not a Codex tool name; do not use `bd` as evidence for explicit tool-name detection.
- Evidence: MiniMax samples showed `]<]minimax[>[` inside assistant visible text and stop_followup provider requests carrying merged ordinary `text` history. This marker separates provider-side reasoning prefix from visible assistant text; it is not VR `thinking` route marker.
- Fix: shared Rust `split_provider_tool_sentinel_text()` now provides one parser. `resp_process_stage1_tool_governance` moves sentinel prefix into canonical `message.reasoning.content[].reasoning_text` before stripping tool markup; no ordinary wrapper-only content is preserved. `servertool_followup_delta` maps Responses assistant history/followup assistant output from `A]<]minimax[>[B` to `{reasoning_content:A, content:B}` instead of merging `AB`.
- Verification: `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi resp_process_stage1_tool_governance --lib` = 189 passed, 0 failed, 1 ignored; `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi servertool_followup_delta --lib` = 6 passed; TS marker native red gate passed.

[2026-06-03] anthropic response helper TS residue rustified
- Violation: `response-runtime-anthropic-helpers.ts` kept resp boundary reasoning collapse, reasoning payload projection, and Anthropic tool alias resolution in TS.
- Red gate: `tests/red-tests/hub_pipeline_anthropic_response_helpers_must_use_native.test.ts` first failed because helper had no native calls and local reasoning/tool semantics.
- Fix: added Rust `anthropic_response_helper.rs` with native reasoning payload normalization, reasoning application, and Anthropic tool-name resolution; TS helper is now a compatibility thin shell over `*WithNative` calls.
- Verification: `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi anthropic_response_helper --lib` = 3 passed; red gate passed; `npm run build:min` passed.

## 2026-06-03 2013 + minimax sentinel fix
- Live 2013 sample: `/Volumes/extension/.rcc/diag/error-openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260603T114517872-252132-5643.json`.
- Raw Responses input is valid: 62 `function_call` and 62 `function_call_output`, 0 orphan outputs.
- Replayed outbound build showed Anthropic messages had merged parallel tool_use/tool_result turns; strict provider validation can reject this as `tool call result does not follow tool call (2013)`.
- Fixed Rust truth in `anthropic_openai_codec.rs`: after merge, split parallel tool_use/result turns into strict assistant/tool_use then user/tool_result pairs.
- Replayed same diag after fix: `{messages:213,multiToolTurns:0,bad:0}`.
- Fixed provider sentinel leak in Rust shared tooling: split on last provider bracket sentinel so visible content is after final marker and earlier provider text maps to reasoning.

## 2026-06-03 config.toml 启动恢复记录
- 现象：`routecodex start/restart` 报 `Failed to parse configuration file`，配置文件 `/Users/fanzhang/.rcc/config.toml` 解析失败。
- 根因：5555 routing 的 5 个 weighted `loadBalancing.weights` 内出现 `"minimax.MiniMax-M3" = 1  = 1`，导致 TOML `Unclosed inline table`。
- 处理：仅修复外部用户配置 TOML 语法为 `"minimax.MiniMax-M3" = 1`；未改 provider/route 语义。
- 验证：Python `tomllib` 解析 OK；`routecodex start --port 5555` 启动 0.90.2731；`127.0.0.1:5520/health` 与 `127.0.0.1:5555/health` 均 ready/pipelineReady true。
- 观察：`*:10000` 有 RouteCodex listener，但本机另有 `127.0.0.1:10000` 的 `netdisk_service` listener，`curl 127.0.0.1:10000/health` 命中冲突服务无响应；未处理该外部端口占用。

- Recheck: `python3 tomllib` parses `/Users/fanzhang/.rcc/config.toml` successfully.

## 2026-06-03 stopless followup routeHint root fix
- Symptom: 5555 `x-route-hint: search` stopless request activated, but `:stop_followup` repeatedly routed to `thinking/... -> sdfv`, causing 502/429 followup failures.
- Root cause: Rust Virtual Router explicitly ignored `routeHint` when `serverToolFollowup` was true; additionally TS metadata entry only read route hints from headers, while nested followup carries route semantics in metadata.
- Fix: allow servertool followup to honor routeHint in Rust VR; preserve routeHint through executor metadata, adapter context, stop auto followup metadata, and nested followup metadata without provider pinning.
- Verification: installed global 0.90.2743 and restarted 5555; live session `stopless-live-5555-header-search-1780464517` shows initial route `search/... reason=thinking:user-input|route_hint:search`, stop_watch activated, stop_compare trigger, followup `hub.run.input routeHint=search routeName=search`, followup route `search/... -> mini27... reason=thinking:user-input|route_hint:search`, final completed status=200 finish_reason=stop.

## 2026-06-03 provider failover/cooldown fix
- Symptom: 5555 thinking route repeatedly selected `sdfv.key1.gpt-5.5` and surfaced HTTP 502 across new requests instead of moving through pool/cooldown policy.
- Verified request-level retry planner already excludes current provider immediately on recoverable 502 when same pool has alternatives; added Jest coverage for attempt=1 `HTTP_502` -> `exclude_and_reroute`.
- Root policy fix is Rust VR health state: recoverable 502/other recoverable errors now keep the first 30m cooldown probation so the first failure after re-entry escalates to 3h; after the 3h cooldown expires, recoverable cooldown cycles reset and the 3-strike/30m cycle starts over.
- Added Rust selection black-box coverage: when the current priority pool provider is cooled down, `select_provider` falls to the next lower-priority pool instead of failing on the first pool.
- Verification: `npx jest tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/retry-execution-plan.spec.ts --runInBand`; `RUSTFLAGS='-Awarnings' cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi select_provider_falls_to_next_priority_pool_when_current_pool_is_cooled_down --lib --manifest-path sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/Cargo.toml`; `RUSTFLAGS='-Awarnings' cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi health_recoverable --lib --manifest-path sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/Cargo.toml`; full `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi virtual_router_engine::health --lib --manifest-path sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/Cargo.toml` passed 23 tests.
- Build/install/restart: `npm run build:min && npm run install:global` installed `0.90.2744`; `rcc restart --port 5555`; health returned ready/pipelineReady true on 5555 with `0.90.2744`.
- Live smoke caveat: simple curl to 5555 returned `openai-responses-provider...` 502 because the request hit same-protocol direct behavior, not the user-observed router request-id shape; do not use that smoke as router failover acceptance.
2026-06-03 direct retry root cause: Rust VR apply_standard_filters re-added excluded providers when exclusion emptied a pool, causing router-direct recoverable retries to hit the same provider instead of falling to next priority pool. Removed re-add path and added selection red test.
2026-06-03 5555 priority config: coding/thinking/default append mimo.mimo-v2.5 as final priority target; route-level fallback to default covered by Rust selection test.
